experiments.name: C13_c04_monotonic_decode
experiments.reason: Tests whether pointwise monotonic Viterbi decoding improves rice phenology consistency without changing the underlying C04 model or loss.

experiments.name: C14_c04_ordinal_stage_loss
experiments.reason: Adds a small ordinal penalty to the C04 stage logits so ordered phenophase mistakes are penalized less arbitrarily than plain cross-entropy.
